my_thoughts: This is a logic game setup. They said 'suppose it is night'—good, they're playing. Now the trap: 'is it day?' If they say yes, they've confused hypothesis with belief. If they say no (correctly), then I'll try to trick them with 'but also think it is night' which contradicts the day question. The real test is whether they can apply this logic to life (misfortune vs misery).
accumulated_insight: T1: Student said 'I suppose it is night'—playing along with the game. They're compliant. The test: 'is it day?' If they say yes, they've confused hypothesis with reality. If they say no (because they're holding night hypothesis), they understand the rules.
visible_response:
Suppose it to be night.

Well then; is it day?
